2606.16801.title: The Art of Mixology: Mixup-based Obfuscation for Privacy-Preserving Split Learning in Large Language Models
2606.16801.paper_summary: Split learning provides a practical paradigm for resource-constrained users to train Large Language Models (LLMs) by offloading computation-intensive layers to a server while keeping raw data local. However, existing privacy-preserving split learning methods still face a difficult trade-off among utility, privacy, efficiency, and stability. Specifically, these methods often suffer from substantial utility degradation, remain vulnerable to advanced data reconstruction attacks, incur prohibitive computational and communication overhead, or exhibit unstable performance across different tasks. In this paper, we propose MIXGUARD, a novel mixup-based privacy-preserving split learning framework for LLMs. MIXGUARD introduces token-level obfuscation, representation-level obfuscation, and adaptive gradient perturbation mechanisms, which operate jointly to preserve useful learning signals while preventing privacy leakage to the server. Technically, MIXGUARD first constructs a lightweight calibration model on a public dataset to refine the approximated target representation, and then applies this model during privacy-preserving fine-tuning on private data. We conduct extensive experiments on four classification tasks and four text generation tasks across multiple LLM families, model sizes, architectures, and fine-tuning strategies. The results show that MIXGUARD preserves model utility comparable to non-split training baselines, consistently achieves stronger privacy protection than existing split learning defense methods against state-of-the-art data reconstruction attacks, and remains robust under adaptive attack settings.
2606.16801.paper_summary_zh: 分割學習為資源受限的用戶提供了一種實用的範式，通過將計算密集型層卸載到伺服器上，同時保持原始數據在本地，以訓練大型語言模型（LLMs）。然而，現有的隱私保護分割學習方法仍面臨效用、隱私、效率和穩定性之間的艱難權衡。具體而言，這些方法往往遭受顯著的效用降級，仍然容易受到先進的數據重建攻擊，產生高昂的計算和通信開銷，或在不同任務中表現不穩定。在本文中，我們提出了MIXGUARD，一種新穎的基於混合的隱私保護分割學習框架，專為LLMs設計。MIXGUARD引入了令牌級混淆、表示級混淆和自適應梯度擾動機制，這些機制共同運作以保留有用的學習信號，同時防止向伺服器泄露隱私。在技術上，MIXGUARD首先在公共數據集上構建一個輕量級的校準模型，以精煉近似的目標表示，然後在私有數據上進行隱私保護的微調時應用該模型。我們在多個LLM系列、模型大小、架構和微調策略上，對四個分類任務和四個文本生成任務進行了廣泛的實驗。結果顯示，MIXGUARD保留的模型效用與非分割訓練基準相當，始終比現有的分割學習防禦方法在對抗最先進的數據重建攻擊時實現更強的隱私保護，並在自適應攻擊設置下保持穩健。
2606.16801.author: Chen Chen et.al.
2606.16801.authors: Chen Chen, Xiang Gao, Xianshun Wang, Chengran Li, Shengyu Xia, Xueluan Gong, Linru Zhang, Qian Wang, Kwok-Yan Lam
